_comment: Folio legal docs manifest. Source of truth for the latest ToS / Privacy version: a GitHub Action syncs this into Supabase tos_versions (which the app reads), and it is also bundled into the app as an offline fallback. Bump version + summary when ToS / Privacy changes.

terms.summary_zh: v1.3：新增香港地區適用 — 合法內容移除（含 PCPD 停止披露通知）、管轄保留條款（不影響當地強行法權利）；新增「內容不代表平台立場」、「非專業建議」與「用戶賠償」條款；並補一般條款（可分性、權利讓與等）。
terms.summary_en: v1.3: Adds Hong Kong coverage — lawful content-removal (incl. PCPD cessation notices) and a governing-law savings clause for mandatory local rights; adds content-not-platform-views, no-professional-advice, and user-indemnification clauses; adds standard miscellaneous clauses (severability, assignment, etc.).

privacy.summary_zh: v1.3：新增香港 PDPO 適用與香港用戶權利（查閱 / 改正 / 拒絕直接行銷 / 投訴、40 日回覆）；補充檢舉 / 封鎖資料、同意紀錄之 IP 與裝置識別、通知送達紀錄、跨境傳輸與直接行銷說明；揭露檢舉紀錄 5 年保留、並釐清刪帳號後共讀內容之匿名化處理。
privacy.summary_en: v1.3: Adds Hong Kong PDPO coverage and HK user rights (access / correction / direct-marketing opt-out / complaint, 40-day response); discloses report/block data, consent-record IP & device identifiers, notification-delivery log, cross-border and direct-marketing details, report-record 5-year retention, and clarified anonymisation of co-reading content after account deletion.
